content: The Self-Refine framework’s iterative self-feedback loop can be enhanced by integrating the multiple inconsistent solving perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a multi-perspective self-refine framework that resolves blind spots in single-perspective self-correction. This hybrid approach retains Self-Refine’s key advantage of requiring no additional training or labeled data, while fixing the common failure mode where single-perspective self-feedback overlooks logical or structural flaws the base LLM cannot recognize on its own.
